title: Scarpyen
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The massive predatory '''scarpyen''' were [[Arthropod/Legends|arthropods]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They were black in appearance with a hard, [[Chitin/Legends|chitinous]] [[Exoskeleton|shell]] that allowed them to blend well into the darkness of their homeworld's forests. They would stun or disable prey with their segmented tails, and, once the prey was vulnerable, the scarpyen would then use its claws to grasp the food and inject a powerful [[Poison/Legends|venom]] into it, using its dagger-like stinger.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]''
